name: 360 Photo Viewer
short_description: Program for Viewing Spherical Panoramas. Explore the world of 360-degree panoramas: free camera rotation, zooming, 8K snapshots. Automatic panorama transitions for full immersion. Just select the folder and click «View Photos».
detailed_description:
360° Panorama Viewer

Imagine a virtual journey where you can explore stunning 360-degree panoramas as if you were actually there. Revisit your memories by viewing your own panoramic shots and reliving moments you once experienced.

  • Free camera control: You can rotate the camera in any direction, zoom in and out on areas of interest, and take 8K snapshots.

  • Automatic demonstration mode: If you release the mouse and keys for 5 seconds, the program will automatically start showing panoramas. It smoothly rotates the image horizontally by 400 degrees, then the panorama fades out and the next one appears.

  • Easy start: To begin, simply select a folder with spherical panoramic photos and click the "View Photos" button.

The 360° panorama viewer is perfect for users with extensive collections of spherical 360-degree panoramas and owners of cameras for their shooting. The quality of snapshots taken by pressing the "S" key directly depends on the quality of the panoramas themselves.

The program supports .jpg and .png files.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Simplified Chinese, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil
